ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the document (e.g., VIHA staff) */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the document (e.g., PDF) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the document was created or uploaded */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the document in pages */,
  "information_focus" TEXT /* Type of information or focus of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the document */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the document is active */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the document contains sensitive information */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level required to view the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created or uploaded */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Annual Plan, Statistical Report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for the file (if encrypted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_files_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the metadata relates to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., Author, Department) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata (e.g., VIHA, Healthcare) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the metadata is confidential */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_metadata_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* The tag itself */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_approval" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user approving the document */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was approved or rejected */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the approval process */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the approval is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approval_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approval_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, compliance) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is archived */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_reports_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
